TTtp-28-1 0/45-TT^ (I), T1RR§ 21 few, 1945 1R1 y*lP^ld t%tr TTQ; ^ sfk 3Tf!w ^ 3 J ^ T ^ M^\.fK 45(3T),MR§ 21-1-2010 SHI f ^ T l ' P n I (l) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3{i)l MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani Siddha and Homoeopathy) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th April, 2010 G.S.R. 337(E).—Whereas the draft of certain rules further to amend the Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945 was published, vide notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, number G.S.R. 16(E), dated the 7th January, 2010, in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, dated the 7th January, 2010, inviting objections and suggestions from persons likely to be affected thereby and notice was given that the said draft will be taken into consideration after the expiry of a period of three months from the date on which copies of the Official Gazette containing the said notification were made available to the public; And whereas, the said Gazette was made avai lable to the public on the 7th January, 2010; And whereas, objections and suggestions received from the public on the said draft rules have been considered by the Centra! Government; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 33-N of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government, hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945, namely:— RULES These rules may be called the Drugs and Cosmetics (2nd Amendment) Ru les, 2010. In the Schedule-I to the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940),— (a) under sub-heading "AYURVEDA", in the entries after serial number 21, the following shall be added :— "21 (a) Rastantra Sar Va Siddha Prayog Samgraha Part II (Edition 2006)." (b) under sub-heading "AYURVEDA", the entries corresponding to 54A "Ayurvedic Formulary of India |xxx]", shall be substituted with the entries "Ayurvedic Formulary of India and its Parts". (c) after serial number 54C and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely :— . "54D. Ayurvedic Pharmacopoeia of India and its Parts." (d) under sub-heading "SIDDHA", after serial number 84 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely :— "85. Siddha Pharmacopoeia of India and its Parts." [No. K. 11020/08/2009-DCC(AYUSH)] B.ANAND.Jt.Secy. Foot Note ;—The Principal rules were published in Official Gazette vide Notification No. F-28-10/45-11(1), dated 21-12-1945 and the last amended vide No.G.S.R.45(E),dated21-l-2010. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapurj, New Pelhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
